exercises.name: Push-Ups
exercises.description: A chest exercise focusing on Push-Ups.
exercises.instructions: Perform Push-Ups by following the movement demonstrated in the video. Focus on maintaining a slow and controlled tempo.
exercises.benefits: Chest gets stronger, Without any equipment, Core gets stronger
exercises.commonMistakes: Do not bend your back, Do not strain your wrists
exercises.safetyWarnings: Maintain proper form and breathe regularly.

exercises.name: Incline Push-Ups
exercises.description: A chest exercise focusing on Incline Push-Ups.
exercises.instructions: Perform Incline Push-Ups by following the movement demonstrated in the video. Focus on maintaining a slow and controlled tempo.
exercises.commonMistakes: Use a stable surface
exercises.safetyWarnings: Maintain proper form and breathe regularly.

exercises.name: Decline Push-Ups
exercises.description: A chest exercise focusing on Decline Push-Ups.
exercises.instructions: Perform Decline Push-Ups by following the movement demonstrated in the video. Focus on maintaining a slow and controlled tempo.
exercises.commonMistakes: Avoid if shoulder hurts
exercises.safetyWarnings: Maintain proper form and breathe regularly.

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.description: A chest exercise focusing on Barbell Bench Press.
exercises.instructions: Perform Barbell Bench Press by following the movement demonstrated in the video. Focus on maintaining a slow and controlled tempo.
exercises.commonMistakes: Use a spotter, Increase weight slowly
exercises.safetyWarnings: Maintain proper form and breathe regularly.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.description: A chest exercise focusing on Incline Dumbbell Press.
exercises.instructions: Perform Incline Dumbbell Press by following the movement demonstrated in the video. Focus on maintaining a slow and controlled tempo.
exercises.commonMistakes: Do not fully lock elbows
exercises.safetyWarnings: Maintain proper form and breathe regularly.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Chest Fly
exercises.description: A chest exercise focusing on Dumbbell Chest Fly.

exercises.commonMistakes: Use light weight
exercises.safetyWarnings: Maintain proper form and breathe regularly.

exercises.name: Cable Crossover
exercises.description: A chest exercise focusing on Cable Crossover.
exercises.instructions: Grip both cables from above., Lean slightly forward., Bring hands together in front.
exercises.commonMistakes: Do not swing body
exercises.safetyWarnings: Maintain proper form and breathe regularly.

exercises.name: Chest Dips
exercises.description: A chest exercise focusing on Chest Dips.
exercises.instructions: Perform Chest Dips by following the movement demonstrated in the video. Focus on maintaining a slow and controlled tempo.
exercises.commonMistakes: Avoid if you have shoulder pain
exercises.safetyWarnings: Maintain proper form and breathe regularly.

exercises.name: Decline Bench Press
exercises.description: A chest exercise focusing on Decline Bench Press.
exercises.instructions: Lie on the decline bench with feet secured., Grip the bar slightly wider than shoulders., Bring the bar slowly to the lower chest., Squeeze chest and push the bar up.
exercises.benefits: Lower chest development, Lower chest defined
exercises.commonMistakes: Use a spotter, Do not pull your neck
exercises.safetyWarnings: Maintain proper form and breathe regularly.

exercises.name: Pec Deck Machine
exercises.description: A chest exercise focusing on Pec Deck Machine.
exercises.instructions: Perform Pec Deck Machine by following the movement demonstrated in the video. Focus on maintaining a slow and controlled tempo.
exercises.commonMistakes: Do not jerk the weight, Full range of motion
exercises.safetyWarnings: Maintain proper form and breathe regularly.

exercises.name: Machine Chest Press
exercises.description: A chest exercise focusing on Machine Chest Press.
exercises.instructions: Perform Machine Chest Press by following the movement demonstrated in the video. Focus on maintaining a slow and controlled tempo.
exercises.benefits: Stable movement, Safe bench press alternative for beginners
exercises.commonMistakes: Keep correct seat height
exercises.safetyWarnings: Maintain proper form and breathe regularly.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Pullover
exercises.description: A chest exercise focusing on Dumbbell Pullover.

exercises.commonMistakes: Start with light weight, Do not overstretch shoulder

exercises.name: Landmine Press
exercises.description: A chest exercise focusing on Landmine Press.
exercises.instructions: Place one end of bar in landmine., Hold other end with one hand near shoulder., Push bar up and forward., Lower with control.
exercises.benefits: Upper chest + Shoulders, Safe angle for shoulders
exercises.commonMistakes: Keep core tight, Do not lean back
exercises.safetyWarnings: Maintain proper form and breathe regularly.

exercises.name: Svend Press
exercises.description: A chest exercise focusing on Svend Press.
exercises.instructions: Squeeze two plates between palms near chest., Push plates forward keeping chest active., Bring back while maintaining squeeze.
exercises.commonMistakes: Start with light plates
exercises.safetyWarnings: Maintain proper form and breathe regularly.

exercises.name: Pull-Ups
exercises.description: A back exercise focusing on Pull-Ups.
exercises.instructions: Grip bar overhand., Pull up until chin is above bar., Lower slowly.
exercises.commonMistakes: Do not jerk
exercises.safetyWarnings: Maintain proper form and breathe regularly.

exercises.benefits: Biceps and forearms work simultaneously, Grip gets stronger, Brachioradialis muscle develops
exercises.commonMistakes: Do not use excessive weight — control is key, Do not jerk when rotating wrist
exercises.safetyWarnings: Maintain proper form and breathe regularly.

exercises.name: Spider Curl
exercises.description: A biceps exercise focusing on Spider Curl.
exercises.instructions: Perform Spider Curl by following the movement demonstrated in the video. Focus on maintaining a slow and controlled tempo.
exercises.benefits: Strict form — no cheating possible, Biceps peak develops, Excellent isolation
exercises.commonMistakes: Ensure bench is stable, Do not let elbows slide out
exercises.safetyWarnings: Maintain proper form and breathe regularly.

exercises.name: EZ-Bar Curl
exercises.description: A biceps exercise focusing on EZ-Bar Curl.
exercises.instructions: Perform EZ-Bar Curl by following the movement demonstrated in the video. Focus on maintaining a slow and controlled tempo.
exercises.benefits: Less strain on wrists than straight bar, Easier to lift heavy weights, Biceps grow evenly
exercises.commonMistakes: Do not lean back, Do not move elbows forward or backward
exercises.safetyWarnings: Maintain proper form and breathe regularly.

exercises.name: Rope Hammer Curl
exercises.description: A biceps exercise focusing on Rope Hammer Curl.
exercises.instructions: Perform Rope Hammer Curl by following the movement demonstrated in the video. Focus on maintaining a slow and controlled tempo.
exercises.benefits: Provides constant tension, Both brachialis and forearms get stronger, Easy on elbows
exercises.commonMistakes: Do not swing back or body, Keep elbows stable
exercises.safetyWarnings: Maintain proper form and breathe regularly.

exercises.name: 21s Bicep Curl
exercises.description: A biceps exercise focusing on 21s Bicep Curl.
exercises.instructions: Grip barbell with underhand grip (light weight)., First 7 reps: curl from bottom to halfway (90°)., Next 7 reps: curl from halfway to top., Final 7 reps: full reps from bottom to top., Total 21 reps = 1 set. Do not stop in between.
exercises.benefits: Intense burn in biceps, Muscle endurance increases, Great for breaking plateaus
exercises.commonMistakes: Do not use too much weight — form is important, For experienced people — beginners should avoid
exercises.safetyWarnings: Maintain proper form and breathe regularly.

exercises.name: Cross-Body Hammer Curl
exercises.description: A biceps exercise focusing on Cross-Body Hammer Curl.
exercises.instructions: Perform Cross-Body Hammer Curl by following the movement demonstrated in the video. Focus on maintaining a slow and controlled tempo.
exercises.benefits: Special emphasis on brachialis muscle, Increases bicep thickness, Fixes unilateral imbalance
exercises.commonMistakes: Do not rotate body, Do not let dumbbells hit chest
exercises.safetyWarnings: Maintain proper form and breathe regularly.
